scripts.build: mkdir -p dist && cp index.html rankings.html challenges.html about.html dist/ && cp -r css js dist/ && cp public/tats_wideass_hero.jpg dist/ && if [ -f public/tats_wideass_hero_1920.svg ]; then cp public/tats_wideass_hero_1920.svg dist/; fi
scripts.deploy: npm run build && npx --yes wrangler deploy
